articles.title: Bill Simmons seems convinced that ‘all signs are pointing to’ this date for Jayson Tatum’s return
articles.description:
Will Tatum return this Friday against the Mavericks? Bill Simmons says it feels that way.

The post Bill Simmons seems convinced that ‘all signs are pointing to’ this date for Jayson Tatum’s return appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bill Simmons predicts Jayson Tatum's return on March 3 against the Mavericks.
Tatum's return could significantly boost the Celtics' playoff chances this season.
Boston fans eagerly anticipate Tatum's impact on team performance and morale.

articles.title: Should teens be allowed to carry handguns in Massachusetts?
articles.description:
Massachusetts’s highest court will consider whether teens and young adults can legally carry firearms.

The post Should teens be allowed to carry handguns in Massachusetts? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts's highest court will review handgun laws for teens and young adults.
Current laws restrict handgun possession for individuals under 21 years old.
Potential changes could affect youth gun violence rates in Boston.

articles.title: 5 takeaways from Don Sweeney’s Bruins press conference before trade deadline
articles.description:
"We'd like to give them a bump because they've earned that."

The post 5 takeaways from Don Sweeney’s Bruins press conference before trade deadline appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Don Sweeney confirmed Bruins aim to support players before the March 3 trade deadline.
Sweeney emphasized the team's commitment to rewarding players' efforts this season.
Local fans can expect potential roster changes to enhance Bruins' playoff chances.

articles.title: Giannis Antetokounmpo set to return against Celtics while Jaylen Brown is out with an illness
articles.description:
Antetokounmpo hasn't plated since a calf strain sidelined him in late January.

The post Giannis Antetokounmpo set to return against Celtics while Jaylen Brown is out with an illness appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Giannis Antetokounmpo returns to play against the Celtics on March 3, 2026.
Jaylen Brown will miss the game due to illness, impacting Celtics' lineup.
Antetokounmpo's return could affect Celtics' playoff positioning in the Eastern Conference.
